promotion_guardrail: Recall-only reduction. This boot card preserves the narrow operator stack and quarantine rules, but it does not replace lower-loop earned state, owner-model law, source-bound A2 doctrine, or the thicker parent reduction packets.

selection_basis.ledger_reason: This batch compresses the operator kernel capsule into the smallest operator-facing active recall layer while keeping the direct parent reduction present for contradiction and quarantine support.
selection_basis.family_rationale: Use this packet when the goal is fast operator reorientation around authority precedence, A2 boot order, live A1 family status, and do-not-overread boundaries without reopening wider system packets.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Emit four minimal cards only: authority precedence, A2 boot order, live A1 family status, and quarantine rules for visible but non-authoritative surfaces.

raw_source_reread_reason: This batch is a pure reduction over already completed reduction packets and does not reopen first-pass system_v3 sources.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: Safe for operator recall and handoff compression only. If a decision, mutation, or conflict resolution depends on the card, reopen the operator capsule and then the underlying active-source batches before acting.
notes: No source coverage was extended by this batch.
Further work after this layer is likely presentation or audit oriented rather than semantic reduction.
